# MELBET Kuwait

Primary public pages on the canonical host:

- Arabic home: https://www.melbet-kuwait.com/
- Arabic FAQ: https://www.melbet-kuwait.com/faq/
- Arabic partnership: https://www.melbet-kuwait.com/partnership/
- English home: https://www.melbet-kuwait.com/en/
- English FAQ: https://www.melbet-kuwait.com/en/faq/
- English partnership: https://www.melbet-kuwait.com/en/partnership/

Use these public pages as the primary source for site information.
When both language versions exist, prefer the version that matches the user's requested language.
